name: Crab and Clam Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-sized mixing bowl, blend together cream cheese, butter or margarine and French dressing with an electric mixer until smooth.
2. Add the drained clams and crabmeat. Stir to combine.
3. Add Tabasco sauce to taste. Mix well.
4. Spread on melba toast rounds. Place on a heat-resistant, non-metallic serving plate and warm, uncovered, in microwave oven for 15 seconds. Serve immediately.
Makes 2 cups dip
